title: solanum delagoense var. obliquum
intro: Solanum delagoense var. obliquum is a plant species, commonly known as the wild potato or South African nightshade, which is a variety of the Solanum delagoense plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Solanum delagoense var. obliquum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
